// Core Features

Built for the
onchain world

Everything you need to navigate Web3 — from DeFi to NFTs — with military-grade keyless security and zero seed phrase exposure.

🛡

Keyless Security

MPC-powered wallet architecture eliminates seed phrase risk entirely. Your keys never exist on a single device.

↑ Zero Leakage
⛓

Multichain Native

Ethereum, BNB Chain, Polygon, Solana and 40+ networks in a single unified interface with instant bridging.

40+ Networks
💎

NFT Gallery

Full NFT collection management with rarity rankings, floor price tracking, and one-tap listing on all major marketplaces.

Marketplace Ready
📈

DeFi Dashboard

Monitor yields, manage liquidity positions, and execute swaps across DEXs — all with real-time price impact calculations.

Real-time
